title: Vault Jewel Purposer
description: Small utility mod that for organizing jewels in Vault Hunters modpack.
body:
This is a mod for managing jewels in [Vault Hunters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/vault-hunters-1-18-2). 

As you progress through the game, judging value of individual jewels becomes increasingly difficult. You need to consider size of jewels, how many attributes it has and values of each attribute. At some point, selecting the best jewels is not a task mortals can accomplish.

Introducing Jewel Purposer, a one block solution for storing jewels, determining their value and making your tools.
- can store over 24K jewels
- "usefulness" of each jewel is determined by all attributes
- configurable with simple in-game gui
- allows multiple configurations for different "purposes" (i.e. different tool configurations for ores/chests)
- operation is super-fast and simple compared to manually selecting jewels

![Screenshot Here](https://github.com/ImplementsLegend/VaultJewelPurposer/blob/master/web/screenshot.png?raw=true)

For additional information, check out [github ReadMe](https://github.com/ImplementsLegend/VaultJewelPurposer/blob/master/README.md).
